name: Planes v2 Backward-Compat Adapter + Migration Tooling
descriptions: Preserve existing app behavior through monolith adapter and controlled migration to canonical k_hat ordering semantics.
success_criteria: Legacy apps run through adapter with no forced rewrites.
z_index_alias compatibility preserved during migration to k_hat_index canonical order.

hard_no_go_conditions: legacy conformance fails on required app set
forced rewrite required for existing apps
required_commands: uv run pytest tests -k "legacy_planes_conformance or planes_monolith_adapter or z_index_alias" -q

ci_required_checks: uv run pytest tests -k "legacy_planes_conformance or planes_monolith_adapter or z_index_alias" -q
